title: Sensory Saturdays
description:
Join us for Sensory Saturday, a special sensory-friendly event at FloridaRAMA designed to provide a calming, enjoyable experience for individuals with sensory sensitivities.
During this time, we’ll adjust the environment to create a more accessible and inclusive atmosphere, with reduced noise levels, dimmed lighting, and quieter interactions.
This event is perfect for sensory seekers, families, and individuals on the autism spectrum who may find the high-sensory nature of our immersive exhibits overwhelming.
We’ll also have sensory kits available for guests to borrow, as well as designated quiet areas to provide a peaceful retreat when needed.What's includedAdmission is INCLUDED with purchase of each Sensory Saturday ticket!Sensory kits are included upon arrival
